headline: Ball (BALL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Ron Lewis: Thank you, Brandon.  Today, I'm joined on our call by Dan Rabbitt, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.  Packaged liquid volume is continuing to grow globally, and aluminum cans are taking share as consumers, customers and retailers increasingly prioritize convenience, performance and sustainability.

headline: Ball (BALL) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Ron Lewis: Thank you, Brandon.  Today, I'm joined on our call by Dan Rabbitt, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.  With this being my first call as the CEO of Ball Corporation, I'd like to take a minute to share my background and our vision for our company.

headline: How Ball’s Q1 2026 Earnings Beat and ESOP Shelf Filing Will Impact Ball (BALL) Investors
summary: Ball Corporation recently reported first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$3,603 million from US$3,097 million and net income increasing to US$205 million from US$179 million, lifting basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations to US$0.77 from US$0.64. Alongside affirming a quarterly dividend of US$0.20 per share and filing a US$916.2 million ESOP-related shelf registration, Ball highlighted margin improvement and earnings growth as it advances...

headline: Ball (NYSE:BALL) Surprises With Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Packaging manufacturer Ball (NYSE:BLL) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 16.3% year on year to $3.6 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.94 per share was 11.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
